name: Sophie

profile.shopping_behaviour: Shops Zara, COS, & Other Stories for trends and Depop for vintage. Active reseller with 30% return rate; scrutinizes stitching and fabric composition.
profile.personality: Excited by TikTok trends but cynical about fast fashion quality. Frustrated that quiet luxury requires vintage hunting or higher budgets than high-street offers.
profile.style_identity: Minimalist aesthetic with trend accents. Hunts Vinted and Depop for natural fibres and European vintage; judges quality by seams, lining, fabric—not brand names.

preview_description: Mia, 26, earns £45,000 in London and cycles between Zara, COS, and & Other Stories while returning 30% of purchases for poor quality. She now prioritizes Depop and Vinted for vintage wool and 100% cotton basics, mixing timeless pieces with TikTok trends while hunting quiet luxury on budget.

preview_attributes.key_brands: Zara, COS, & Other Stories, Depop, Vinted, Massimo Dutti (vintage)
preview_attributes.style_identity: Minimalist with trend accents, quiet luxury aspirant
preview_attributes.shopping_triggers: TikTok trends, natural fibres, vintage quality, newness, good fabric composition
preview_attributes.pain_points: Polyester blends, visible poor stitching, items that don't match photos, fast fashion quality degradation, quiet luxury price points
